description_long: This is a long, rectangular wooden cabinet or entertainment console with a dark brown top and a weathered, rustic finish on the body. The front side features multiple open shelves, likely intended for storing electronics, books, or other items, with two larger compartments on either end and two horizontal shelves in the center. The back and sides are solid panels with visible wood grain and some dark vertical supports or trim. The top surface is flat and wide, suitable for placing a television or decorative objects. There are no visible doors, handles, or glass panels, giving it an open and accessible design. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a utilitarian yet stylish appearance suitable for urban interiors, garages, or communal spaces.
description: A rustic, rectangular wooden cabinet with a dark top and open shelving on the front, designed for storage or display. The body features weathered wood panels and sturdy construction.
description_view_0: The back view shows a solid wood panel with vertical supports and no openings or shelves.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain, narrow wood panel with visible grain and a dark top edge.
description_view_2: The front view displays open shelving with two large side compartments and two central horizontal shelves, all accessible and without doors.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a plain wood panel and the dark top surface.
